headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -99.1)
key_insights: Frustrations trending up 40% over 7 days (strong momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 163 quotes and an overwhelming 131 at strong intensity - people are extremely agitated today.
• The frustration score of 96.2 sits in the upper half of the 58-day range, showing significantly elevated anger from yesterday's 36.9.
• Both fears and optimism remain suppressed with negative scores, though fears improved slightly from yesterday's deeper low.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
